products.name: LAST-A-FOAM® RF-2200
products.descriptor: RF-transparent dielectric polyurethane foam for radomes and antennas

evidence.snippet: **LAST-A-FOAM® DIELECTRIC FOAM SERIES**

*   Radome
*   High temperature core material
*   [Aerospace components](https://www.generalplastics.com/blog/dielectric-foam-material-trends-in-aerospace-rf-design)

products.name: LAST-A-FOAM® FR-6700
products.descriptor: Flame-retardant aerospace and military grade rigid closed-cell polyurethane foam

evidence.snippet: LAST-A-FOAM® FR-6700

FR-6700 is specifically designed to satisfy the physical property, flammability performance and processing requirements of multiple aerospace and military specifications. These include Boeing BMS 8-133, McDonnell-Douglas DMS-1937, and Federal Aviation Regulation FAR 25.853 (a). We can supply certificate of conformance and test data upon request.

products.name: LAST-A-FOAM® R-3300
products.descriptor: Closed-cell hydrostatic pressure-resistant polyurethane buoyancy foam for subsea applications

evidence.snippet: LAST-A-FOAM® R-3300 BUOYANCY FOAM SERIES
LAST-A-FOAM® R-3300 is a closed-cell, hydrostatic pressure-resistant polyurethane foam that provides buoyancy to depths of up to 1,200 feet. It is typically supplied uncoated.

products.name: LAST-A-FOAM® FR-3800 FST
products.descriptor: Halogen-free FST/OSU-compliant polyurethane foam core for aerospace interiors

evidence.snippet: LAST-A-FOAM® FR-3800 FST

*   Passes Fire/Smoke/Toxicity (FST) requirements
*   Meets OSU 65/65 heat release standards
*   Alternative to thermoplastics and honeycomb in FST applications

products.name: LAST-A-FOAM® TR-Marine
products.descriptor: High-density closed-cell polyurethane foam core for FRP composite boat building

evidence.snippet: LAST-A-FOAM® TR-Marine High Density Foam Core

#### Applications
*   Transoms – Use 15-, 20- or 24-lb. pcf density
*   Stringers – Use 6- to 20-lb. pcf density depending on structural need
*   Seat mounting pads, steering wheel mounting – Use 24- to 30-lb. pcf density
*   Decks, bulkheads – Use 10- to 15-lb. pcf density, depending on laminate schedule

unresolved_questions: No NDAA Section 848/889 compliance language was found for any individual product in the corpus; the site displays a 'Buy American' badge in the footer but makes no explicit per-product NDAA claim.
No Blue UAS cleared-list mention found anywhere in the corpus.
FR-6700 page references Boeing BMS 8-133, McDonnell-Douglas DMS-1937, and FAR 25.853(a) aerospace/military specs — these are product-level compliance claims but not NDAA claims.
FR-3800 FST page claims FST/OSU 65/65 and EU REACH compliance but no NDAA claim.
Foam-Comb meets FAR 25.853 flame-retardant standard per product page but no NDAA claim.
